title: No Lock Against Letchery.
content:
Bar close as you can, and bolt fast too your door,
    To keep out the letcher, and keep in the whore;
    Yet quickly you'll see by the turn of a pin,
    The whore to come out, or the letcher come in.
meaning:
"No Lock Against Letchery." is a quintessential example of Robert Herrick's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
